summary: Iteration 159 - Frontend Testing for My Bookings, Shop Search, Admin Mobile, Services Navbar, and CinematicKitAssembly. All requested features verified and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MemberDashboard.jsx: Correctly fetches both /api/mira/my-requests AND /api/user/bookings - merges them into unified list
ShopPage.jsx: Search bar has pill style (rounded-full), placeholder shows 'Search treats, toys, food...', clear button (X) works
Admin.jsx: Mobile dropdown menu selector working - shows 'Quick Access' and 'All Sections' categories
Services page: Only 1 navbar and 1 footer - duplicate navbar fix verified
CinematicKitAssembly.jsx: Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/CinematicKitAssembly.jsx with step-by-step product reveal
MiraChatWidget.jsx: Imports CinematicKitAssembly, has 'View Kit Experience' button that triggers cinematic kit modal
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified: 1) Member Dashboard Bookings tab fetches both Mira requests AND user bookings, 2) Shop page search bar has pill style with clear button, 3) Admin panel mobile view shows dropdown menu selector, 4) Services page has only ONE navbar, 5) CinematicKitAssembly component created and integrated into MiraChatWidget with 'View Kit Experience' button.
